encounters.provider: Dr. Olivia Reyes (ED), Dr. Lena Park (MICU attending), Dr. Daniel Okafor (Medicine), Dr. Rachel Imani (Hepatology), Dr. Sameer Iqbal (IR), Dr. Wendy Stead (Infectious Diseases consult), Dr. Emily Rubin (Palliative Care consult)
encounters.chiefComplaint: Three months of unintentional weight loss; abdominal distension and dyspnea — then massive hematemesis
diagnoses: Decompensated alcohol-related cirrhosis with portal hypertension
Acute variceal hemorrhage — s/p attempted banding + emergent TIPS
New ascites (paracentesis negative for SBP) and bilateral pleural effusions
Involuntary weight loss (~20 lb/3 months) under evaluation
Refractory shock and persistent fevers of uncertain source (extensive infectious workup negative)
Ultimately: presumed drug fever and drug-associated neurotoxicity (recognized after antibiotic cessation)
encounters.status: Prolonged ICU course; made CMO at ~2 weeks, then unexpectedly recovered after antibiotics stopped; transferred out of ICU and discharged 5/30/2027

encounters.chiefComplaint: Cirrhosis follow-up; weight loss and poor appetite
diagnoses: Unintentional weight loss — workup in progress
Reported decreased appetite / early unintentional weight loss
